title: GMS Week 11 - CATCHING THE HIGH!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 20/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-20_gms-week-11-catching-the-high_img1.jpg
The ongoing surge in recycling rates has sustained for another week, even though a slight reduction in supplycoupled with some volatility on steel plate prices (especially in India), seemed to put a minor dampener across markets over the last few days. An improvement in Container and Dry Bulk charter rates has reduced the flow of candidates for recycling over the last couple of weeks and so much of the firming local demand may still go unrealized for some time. Indeed, there has only been a trickle of vessels for sale in this last week, and so only a few Owners appear to have cashed in at these higher rates, perhaps at the peak of the market.
